parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "cc_report" (
  "ID", "ID_SEED", "ID_CC", "CC", "CC_LABEL", "VENCIMENTO", "FORNECEDOR",
  "NOME_DESPESA", "SITUACAO", "DATA_PAGAMENTO", "CATEGORIA", "VALOR", "TYPE",
  "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transformed.ID }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.ID_SEED }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.ID_CC }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.CC }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.CC_LABEL }}',
  {{ if $json.transformed.VENCIMENTO }}'{{ $json.transformed.VENCIMENTO }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  '{{ $json.transformed.FORNECEDOR }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.NOME_DESPESA }}',
  '{{ $json.transformed.SITUACAO }}',
  {{ if $json.transformed.DATA_PAGAMENTO }}'{{ $json.transformed.DATA_PAGAMENTO }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  '{{ $json.transformed.CATEGORIA }}',
  {{ $json.transformed.VALOR }},
  '{{ $json.transformed.TYPE }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT ("ID")
DO UPDATE SET
  "CC_LABEL" = EXCLUDED."CC_LABEL",
  "VENCIMENTO" = EXCLUDED."VENCIMENTO",
  "FORNECEDOR" = EXCLUDED."FORNECEDOR",
  "NOME_DESPESA" = EXCLUDED."NOME_DESPESA",
  "SITUACAO" = EXCLUDED."SITUACAO",
  "DATA_PAGAMENTO" = EXCLUDED."DATA_PAGAMENTO",
  "CATEGORIA" = EXCLUDED."CATEGORIA",
  "VALOR" = EXCLUDED."VALOR",
  "TYPE" = EXCLUDED."TYPE",
  "updated_at" = NOW()
WHERE (
  "cc_report"."SITUACAO" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."SITUACAO" OR
  "cc_report"."VALOR" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."VALOR" OR
  "cc_report"."DATA_PAGAMENTO" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."DATA_PAGAMENTO"
);
